zh.Torrie, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wardlaw於1293年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓時，他的父親Henry Wardlaw25歲，母親Annice McDowell23歲。他與Mary Stewart結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.Torrie, Midlothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wardlaw于1293年出生在苏格兰洛包爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Henry Wardlaw25岁，母亲Annice McDowell23岁。他与Mary Stewart结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wardlaw was born in 1293, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Henry Wardlaw, was 25 and his mother, Annice McDowell, was 23. He married Mary Stewart. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1368, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wardlaw est né en 1293, à Wilton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Henry Wardlaw, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Annice McDowell, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mary Stewart. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1368, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Wardlaw 1293 in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Wardlaw 25 und seine Mutter Annice McDowell 23. Er hat Mary Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1368 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wardlaw è nato il nel 1293 nel Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Henry Wardlaw, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Annice McDowell, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mary Stewart. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1368, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlawが1293年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Henry Wardlawは25歳，母Annice McDowellは23歳であった。Mary Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlaw(이)가 1293년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wardlaw(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Annice McDowell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Mary Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wardlaw nasceu em 1293, em Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Wardlaw, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Annice McDowell, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Stewart. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1368, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Wardlaw родился в 1293 г. в местности уилтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Henry Wardlaw было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Annice McDowell, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Stewart. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1368 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Wardlaw nació en 1293, en Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Henry Wardlaw, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Annice McDowell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mary Stewart. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1368, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
